---
title: "The Rev. John Trant Bramston"
---

## The Rev. John Trant Bramston

**Dates:** (1843-1931)

### Description

brother of Mary Bramston and half-brother of Anna Bramston

### Biography

He married (29 Dec 1875) Jane Ady (CMY spells Adey),  'daughter of Archdeacon Adey'.  He taught at Winchester 1868-1908. [WWW LG 1906 Bramston]

### Letters

- Letter from March 27th 1882
- Letter from July 31st 1875
- Letter from Novr 21st [1871?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
